tool.name: obitaxonomy
tool.description: manage and request a taxonomy database

param.name: extract_taxonomy
param.label: Do you want to extract taxonomy from a sequence file?

param.name: with_leaves
param.label: Extract leaves
param.help: Adds the input sequences themselves as leaf nodes under their respective taxids in the extracted taxonomy.

param.name: name_query
param.label: Search taxon names by regex (or literal with fixed mode is enabled)

validator.message: Please enter a valid taxon name

param.name: fixed
param.label: Match taxon names using a fixed pattern, not a regular expression

param.name: alternative_names
param.label: Enable the search on all alternative names and not only scientific names.

param.name: rank_list
param.label: List every taxonomic rank available in the taxonomy.

param.name: with_path
param.label: Adds a column containing the full path for each displayed taxon.

param.name: with_query
param.label: Adds a column containing query used to filter taxon name for each displayed taxon.

param.name: without_parent
param.label: Supress the column containing the parent’s taxonid from the output.

param.name: without_rank
param.label: Supress the column containing the taxonomic rank from the output.

param.name: without_scientific_name
param.label: Supress the column containing the scientific name from the output.

param.name: dump
param.label: Dump a sub-taxonomy corresponding to the precised clade

param.name: parents
param.label: Displays every parental tree’s information for the provided taxid.

param.name: sons
param.label: Displays every sons’ tree’s information for the provided taxid.

param.name: without_root
param.label: excludes the non-branching path from the specified clade root up to the overall taxonomy root (taxid 1)

param.name: update_taxid
param.label: Automatically replaces taxids that have been declared as merged into a newer taxid in the taxonomy

param.name: fail_on_tax
param.label: Exits with a fatal error if any taxid encountered during processing is not a currently valid entry in the taxonomy
param.help: Combine with update taxid option to first auto-update deprecated taxids before applying this check.

tool.help:
.. class:: infomark
**What it does**
obitaxonomy is a tool to request and manage taxonomic database.
obitaxonomy specific options
* alternative-names : Enable the search on all alternative names and not only scientific names. (default: false)
* download-ncbi : Download the current NCBI taxonomy taxdump (default: false)
* dump : Dump a sub-taxonomy corresponding to the precised clade (default: “”)
* extract-taxonomy : Extract taxonomy from a sequence file (default: false)
* fixed : Match taxon names using a fixed pattern, not a regular expression (default: false)
* parents : Displays every parental tree’s information for the provided taxid. (default: “NA”)
* rank : Restrict to the given taxonomic rank. (default: “”)
* rank-list : List every taxonomic rank available in the taxonomy. (default: false)
* restrict-to-taxon : Restrict output to some subclades. (default: [])
* sons : Displays every sons’ tree’s information for the provided taxid. (default: “NA”)
* with-path : Adds a column containing the full path for each displayed taxon. (default: false)
* with-query : Adds a column containing query used to filter taxon name for each displayed taxon. (default: false)
* without-parent : Supress the column containing the parent’s taxonid from the output. (default: false)
* without-rank : Supress the column containing the taxonomic rank from the output. (default: false)
* without-scientific-name : Supress the column containing the scientific name from the output. (default: false)
@OBITOOLS_LINK_OBI4@
